mapper.select: SELECT pop.visualization_id, popi.params_info_id, popi.param_name, popi.enabled_default, popi.required, popi.default_value, COALESCE( popi.checked, 0 ) AS checked, poptvi.target_view_id, poptvi.target_ds_id, poptvi.match_mode, poptvi.target_field_id FROM core_visualization_parameter_snapshot pop LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot popi ON pop.params_id = popi.params_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_target_snapshot poptvi ON popi.params_info_id = poptvi.params_info_id WHERE pop.visualization_id = #{visualization_id} ORDER BY COALESCE( popi.checked, 0 ) DESC

SELECT #{visualizationId} as visualization_id, COALESCE( vop.checked, 0 ) AS checked FROM core_visualization_snapshot dvi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_snapshot vop ON dvi.id = vop.visualization_id WHERE dvi.id = #{visualizationId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM core_visualization_parameter_target poptvi WHERE poptvi.params_info_id IN ( SELECT params_info_id FROM ( SELECT poptvi.params_info_id FROM core_visualization_parameter_target poptvi INNER JOIN core_visualization_parameter_item popi ON poptvi.params_info_id = popi.params_info_id INNER JOIN core_visualization_parameter pop ON popi.params_id = pop.params_id WHERE pop.visualization_id = #{visualizationId} ) tmp )

DELETE FROM core_visualization_parameter_item popi WHERE popi.params_id IN ( SELECT params_id FROM ( SELECT popi.params_id FROM core_visualization_parameter_item popi INNER JOIN core_visualization_parameter pop ON popi.params_id = pop.params_id WHERE pop.visualization_id = #{visualizationId} ) tmp )

DELETE FROM core_visualization_parameter_target_snapshot poptvi WHERE poptvi.params_info_id IN ( SELECT params_info_id FROM ( SELECT poptvi.params_info_id FROM core_visualization_parameter_target_snapshot poptvi INNER JOIN core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot popi ON poptvi.params_info_id = popi.params_info_id INNER JOIN core_visualization_parameter_snapshot pop ON popi.params_id = pop.params_id WHERE pop.visualization_id = #{visualizationId} ) tmp )

DELETE FROM core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot popi WHERE popi.params_id IN ( SELECT params_id FROM ( SELECT popi.params_id FROM core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot popi INNER JOIN core_visualization_parameter_snapshot pop ON popi.params_id = pop.params_id WHERE pop.visualization_id = #{visualizationId} ) tmp )
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT popi.param_name AS sourceInfo, popi.required AS required, popi.default_value AS default_value, popi.enabled_default AS enabled_default,
TO_CHAR(poptvi.target_view_id) || '#' || TO_CHAR(poptvi.target_field_id) || '#' || poptvi.match_mode AS targetInfo
CONCAT( poptvi.target_view_id, '#', poptvi.target_field_id, '#', poptvi.match_mode ) AS targetInfo
FROM core_visualization_parameter pop LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_item popi ON pop.params_id = popi.params_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_target poptvi ON popi.params_info_id = poptvi.params_info_id WHERE pop.visualization_id = #{visualizationId} and pop.checked=1 and popi.checked=1

SELECT vopi.param_name, vopi.params_info_id FROM core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot vopi INNER JOIN core_visualization_parameter_snapshot vop ON vop.params_id = vopi.params_id WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{visualizationId}
select cdtf.*,cdtf.id as attachId from core_dataset_field cdtf where cdtf.dataset_group_id = #{dataset_group_id} order by cdtf.field_type, cdtf.origin_name
